posts.title: Add Insomnia API Collection
posts.summary: Added an Insomnia API collection to the repository, allowing developers to easily test the Rick and Morty REST API endpoints using the Insomnia HTTP client.

posts.title: Fix GraphQL 404 Error
posts.summary: Fixed a bug where GraphQL endpoint was returning 404 errors for certain queries.

posts.title: Fix Residents Conditional
posts.summary: Fixed a conditional bug affecting the residents field in location responses.

posts.title: Add Season 5 Images
posts.summary: Added character images from Season 5 of Rick and Morty, expanding the image dataset for all newly introduced characters.

posts.title: Add JavaScript Client Library
posts.summary: Added the official JavaScript client library to the readme, making it easier for JS developers to integrate with the Rick and Morty API.

posts.title: Add Dart Client Library
posts.summary: Added a Dart client library for the Rick and Morty API, expanding support to Flutter and Dart developers.
